PROP-baseauction-inv-054.text: Bid flow must emit AuctionBidSettled event with correct asset, amount, and assetOutAmount.
PROP-baseauction-inv-054.assertion: forall bid: emit AuctionBidSettled(asset, amount, assetOutAmount) after transfers

locations.note: AuctionBidSettled emitted at line 455, after safeTransferFrom at line 453
